name: Autumn Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, cinnamon, and melted margarine in a bowl. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 10 minutes.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the softened cream cheese with 1/2 cup sugar until well blended. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition. Stir in the vanilla extract.
3. Pour the cream cheese mixture over the baked crust.
4. Toss the thinly sliced apples with the remaining sugar and cinnamon. Spoon the apple mixture over the cream cheese layer and sprinkle with chopped pecans.
5. Return the cheesecake to the oven and bake at 350 degrees F. for 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until set.
6. Remove from the oven and allow the cheesecake to cool before detaching it from the rim of the pan.
7. Chill before serving.
Variation:
Add an additional 1/2 cup finely chopped pecans with the crumbs for a more flavorful crust. Continue with the recipe as directed.
